prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为"高热推荐"，这些专业恰是太原理工大学在辽宁物理类招生 中的主力专业（计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息工程、自动化等），热门专业集中度高，可能吸引更多高分考生报考。辽宁省2026年高考总报名人数约20万人 ，近年物理类占比约72%–74%，估算物理类考生约14.4–14.8万人，较2025年物理类14.34万人略有增加，竞争基数扩大。；太原理 工大学位于山西省太原市，非辽宁省本地高校；该校在全国招生总人数中辽宁占比约2.5%–3.5%（2025年辽宁招生51人，占全国总招生约8.5%，但该数据包含所有科类），属中等 偏下水平。辽宁考生对省外211高校的报考意愿总体平稳，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次24815名、2026年大幅扩招约31.3%（竞争缓解）、学校软 科排名持续上升（第97名）、计算机/电气/电子信息等热门专业集中度高（吸引高分考生）、辽宁物理类考生总数略有增加等多重因素，扩招带来的位次后移效应与排名上升及热 门专业吸引力之间存在对冲。预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年有所后移，预测约28968名，区间28468–29468名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 20563 → 23368 → 32882 → 23199 → 24815. In 2023, there was an abnormal significant drop (32882), followed by a notable recovery to 23199 in 2024, and a slight drop to 24815 in 2025, showing a fluctuating slight decline in recent two years, with a baseline of about 24815 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning: 2021: 131 → 2022: 124 → 2023: 122 → 2024: 120 → 2025: 112, showing a gradual annual reduction. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 147, an expansion of 35 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 31.3%), which is a notable expansion, and competition pressure is expected to ease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 2021: 113th → 2022: 113th → 2023: 107th → 2024: 108th → 2025: 103rd → 2026: 97th, showing a steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (Secretary Zheng Qiang's management was criticized by students), but there have been no significant negative public opinions in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, with an evaluation of "average," and a comprehensive popularity of about 489,000, indicating a below-average level of attention on short video platforms, with no significant signal of application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology and Pharmaceutical Engineering. Additionally, disciplines like Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Computer Science and Technology are relatively strong, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all "highly recommended hot majors." These are precisely the main majors offered by Taiyuan University of Technology in Liaoning's Physics Category (Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, Automation, etc.), with a high concentration of popular majors, which may attract more high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Gaokao is about 200,000, with Physics Category accounting for about 72%–74% in recent years, estimating about 144,000–148,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase compared to 143,400 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, not a local university in Liaoning. The proportion of Liaoning students in the university's total national enrollment is about 2.5%–3.5% (in 2025, Liaoning enrolled 51 students, accounting for about 8.5% of the total national enrollment, but this data includes all categories), which is below average. Liaoning candidates' willingness to apply for provincial 211 universities is generally stable, with no significant regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 24815, the significant enrollment expansion of about 31.3% in 2026 (easing competition), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (97th), the high concentration of popular majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information (attracting high-scoring candidates), and a slight increase in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning, the ranking-lowering effect of expansion and the ranking-raising effect of improved reputation and popular major attractiveness offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be lower than in 2025, estimated at about 28968, with a range of 28468–29468.

Candidates significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 28000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the upper bound (e.g., after 29000) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 as the core and Tier 3 as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3644 → (no History Category enrollment data for 2022) → 4011 → 3414 → 3914. In the past four years, it has fluctuated: in 2023, it slightly moved back to 4011; in 2024, it significantly moved forward to 3414; in 2025, it moved back again to 3914, with a baseline of about 3914 for 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province: 9 in 2021 → 8 in 2023 → 10 in 2024 → 14 in 2025, showing an expansion trend in recent years. The 2026 plan is 12, a reduction of 2 (about 14.3%) compared to 2025. With fewer enrollment spots, competition is expected to intensify slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 97th in 2026, and the overall level and recognition of the university are steadily improving, positively influencing liberal arts students' willingness to apply. In 2022, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (the school management was criticized), but there have been no significant negative public opinions in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, with an evaluation of "average," showing no significant application heat signal. Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A- (a science and engineering discipline), which has no direct mapping to the History Category enrollment majors (Accounting, English, International Economics and Trade, Administrative Management). However, the 211 level of the university still provides platform support for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: Accounting/Finance/Auditing is "recommended," Law is "differentiated wait-and-see," and Foreign Languages is "general wait-and-see." Among the History Category enrollment majors, Accounting has relatively high popularity, while English/International Economics and Trade have average popularity. The total number of Liaoning Province Gaokao registrants in 2026 is about 200,000, with History Category accounting for about 26%–28% in recent years, estimating about 52,000–56,000 History Category examinees, slightly decreasing or stable compared to 2025's 56,300, so the competition base is basically stable. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Shanxi Province, not a local university in Liaoning. The number of History Category enrollments in Liaoning is very small (only 12 in 2026), making it a marginal category for the university in Liaoning, less affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3914, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 14.3% (intensified competition), the continuous rise in university ranking (positive impact), the basically stable total number of History Category examinees, and the relatively high popularity of Accounting, the ranking forward movement effect due to enrollment reduction dominates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025, estimated at about 3549, with a range of 3049–4049.
